scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.format: prettier --write "*.{json,yml,yaml,md}" ".trae/documents/*.md" && cd frontend && npm run format && cd ../backend && python3 -m ruff format . && python3 -m ruff check --fix .
scripts.format:check: prettier --check "*.{json,yml,yaml,md}" ".trae/documents/*.md" && cd frontend && npm run format:check && cd ../backend && python3 -m ruff format --check . && python3 -m ruff check .
